sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ( CODREVDOC INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGREVDOC PRIMARY KEY (CODREVDOC) )
sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ( CODREVDOC NUMBER(10) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGREVDOC PRIMARY KEY (CODREVDOC) )

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo CODRNC na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD CODRNC INT

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DOCUMENTO na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD DOCUMENTO VARCHAR(200)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo MOTIVO na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD MOTIVO VARCHAR(4000)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo CODPARC na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD CODPARC INT

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DTPRAZO na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD DTPRAZO DATETIME

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo NAOSEAPLICA na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD NAOSEAPLICA CHAR(1)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo CODUSU na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD CODUSU INT

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DHCREATE na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD DHCREATE DATETIME

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DHALTER na tabela THGQMGREVDOC
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGREVDOC ADD DHALTER DATETIME
